mentions.note: Think self-driving vehicles and robots (big growth engines), not just cars; Elon Musk may merge with SpaceX (dual-class structure allows escape from Tesla shareholder noise); if doesn't merge, Meta and Berkshire may lose trillion-dollar status.
Magnificent Seven member (but Cramer's charitable trust held only 6 of 7, not Tesla initially); borrowed heavily for growth with massive opportunity.
Higher-risk growth stock; appropriate for discretionary portfolios with capital to risk, not suitable as core retirement holding.
